_meta.description: Architecture decisions and design patterns in the codebase

decisions.title: Dual-write persistence strategy
decisions.description: Sessions are written to both file storage (data/interview-history.json) and Supabase. File layer is source of truth for existing interview flow; Supabase is source of truth for trainer dashboard, gap scores, and readiness signals.
decisions.rationale: Backward compatibility during migration — existing trainer-led flow must keep working

decisions.title: Prisma + pg adapter for Supabase connection pooling
decisions.description: Uses @prisma/adapter-pg with native pg Pool (max: 5) instead of Prisma's binary driver. Connects via Transaction Pooler (port 6543).
decisions.rationale: Better connection pool control with Supabase's pgBouncer for persistent Node server

decisions.title: Gap scoring with recency-weighted average
decisions.description: Per-skill scores use 0.8 decay factor: score_n * 0.8^0 + score_(n-1) * 0.8^1 + ... normalized. Pure functions in gapService.ts, DB operations in gapPersistence.ts.
decisions.rationale: Recent performance weighted more heavily; 50-line algorithm doesn't need ML infrastructure

decisions.title: Three-state readiness classification
decisions.description: Cascade: ready (avg >= threshold AND trend >= 0 AND sessions >= 3), improving (sessions >= 3 AND trend > 0), not_ready (everything else). Pre-computed on session save.
decisions.rationale: Dashboard reads are instant — no on-the-fly computation

decisions.title: Zustand store as central nervous system
decisions.description: Single Zustand store with persist middleware (localStorage) holds full interview session, setup wizard state, assessments, tech weights, associate slug, and navigation.
decisions.rationale: Simple single-store pattern for solo dev; localStorage persistence survives page refreshes

decisions.title: LangGraph conditional routing for scoring
decisions.description: Scoring workflow routes differently based on question type: starter -> guideline evaluation, technical -> keyword matching + soft skills, public -> transcript evaluation.
decisions.rationale: Different question types need different evaluation strategies

decisions.title: Single-password auth with middleware protection
decisions.description: HttpOnly cookie (nlm_session, 24hr expiry) set on password match. Middleware redirects unauthenticated requests to /login for protected paths.
decisions.rationale: Simplest viable auth for single-trainer use case

decisions.title: Adaptive setup from gap scores
decisions.description: When associate has 3+ sessions, dashboard fetches gap scores and pre-populates tech weights: weakest skills get weight 5, strongest get weight 1, linear interpolation.
decisions.rationale: Interviews automatically focus on weak areas without trainer manual configuration

decisions.title: GitHub-backed question banks
decisions.description: Questions parsed from markdown files in configurable GitHub repos. Fetched via /api/github proxy to keep tokens server-side. Weighted random selection by tech weights + difficulty stratification.
decisions.rationale: Question content managed in Git for version control and collaboration

decisions.title: Standalone Docker build with Prisma tracing
decisions.description: Next.js standalone output with explicit Prisma binary inclusion via outputFileTracingIncludes. Multi-stage Dockerfile with prisma generate during build.
decisions.rationale: Prisma binaries are pruned from standalone output by default — explicit inclusion prevents runtime crashes

decisions.title: Settings-triggered bulk recompute
decisions.description: When trainer changes readiness threshold via /api/settings PUT, all associates' readiness is recomputed with the new threshold.
decisions.rationale: Readiness status must always reflect current threshold — stale classifications would mislead trainers

Settings.notes: id pinned to 1 — only one row ever exists
